package.name: point_2D_extractor
package.description: Multi-camera 3D skeletal pose extraction using AlphaPose and Intel RealSense depth cameras. Runs AlphaPose inference on up to three RealSense streams (front, right, left), deprojects 2D keypoints to 3D metric coordinates using depth maps, and detects operator hand gestures (THUMBS_UP / THUMBS_DOWN) via a dual-hand voting buffer.
